title: cytisus hirsutus var. serotinus
intro: Cytisus hirsutus var. serotinus, also known as the hairy broom or bushy broom, is a variety of the broom plant, which is a shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cytisus hirsutus var. serotinus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as a mild laxative, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
